description_long: This is a tall, slender directional sign consisting of a vertical green pole with a black base. Two yellow arrow-shaped signs are attached near the top, pointing in opposite directions, and a rectangular placard is mounted below the arrows. The placard appears to have a red symbol or text, providing additional information. The pole is metallic and sturdy, designed to withstand outdoor conditions. The overall design is utilitarian, with high visibility colors for the arrows to attract attention and guide pedestrians or drivers.
description: A tall green pole with two yellow directional arrows and a rectangular placard, designed for clear wayfinding in urban environments.
description_view_0: Front view showing both yellow arrows pointing left and right, and the rectangular placard with visible markings.
description_view_1: Side view showing only the thin profile of the pole and the edge of the arrows, with minimal detail visible.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, with the arrows and placard visible but mirrored in direction.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the thin profile of the pole and arrows, with little detail visible.
